meaning: n.抽出,取出,[化]提取(法)萃取法,抽出物,摘要,血统,[数]开方(法)
examples: The extraction process of nucleoprotein and protamine from freshwater fish spermary was studied.
Better conservation methods and a focus on fresh fossils could boost DNA extraction from more delicate specimens.
Community members may reside temporarily in one of the lower zones to manage the extraction of products unavailable in the homeland.
Vahldiek mixes in a little cattle farming and mineral and oil extraction to help pay the bills.
The money generated will depend on the market value at the time of extraction and on licensing arrangements.
